name: Mitochondria Isolation by Differential Centrifugation
nameCn: 差速离心法分离线粒体

components.name: 1. Collect tissue (0.5–2 g liver/heart) or cells (≥5×10⁷); keep ice-cold

note.en: All steps at 4°C. Pre-chill all tools, buffers, centrifuge rotors.
note.zh: 全程 4°C 操作。预冷所有工具、缓冲液、离心转头。

note.en: Transfer to Dounce homogenizer, 5–10 mL buffer/g tissue.
note.zh: 转入 Dounce 匀浆器，每克组织加 5–10 mL 缓冲液。

note.en: Gentle, even pressure. Over-homogenization destroys mitochondria. Cells: N₂ cavitation (1,000 psi, 10 min, 4°C) or 25G syringe needle × 10 strokes.
note.zh: 轻柔均匀推拉。过度匀浆破坏线粒体。细胞：氮气空化（1,000 psi，10 min，4°C）或 25G 针头 × 10 次。

note.en: Keep supernatant (PNS). Discard pellet (nuclei, unbroken cells). Repeat if pellet is large.
note.zh: 保留上清（PNS）。弃沉淀（核、未破碎细胞）。沉淀大时重复一次。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction. Pellet = crude mitochondria.
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分。沉淀 = 粗线粒体。

components.name: 6. Wash: resuspend pellet in 5 mL buffer; repeat 7,000×g spin (×2–3)

note.en: Pellet becomes tighter and less brownish with each wash.
note.zh: 每次洗涤后沉淀更紧实、颜色更浅（去除肌红蛋白和细胞色素 c）。

components.name: 7. Optional: Percoll gradient for pure mitochondria

note.en: 18%/30% Percoll gradient in buffer. 95,000×g 30 min 4°C (SW-41 Ti). Mitochondria at 18/30% interface. Wash 2× at 6,000×g 10 min.
note.zh: 18%/30% Percoll 梯度（缓冲液配制）。95,000×g 30 min 4°C（SW-41 Ti 转头）。线粒体在 18/30% 界面。6,000×g 洗 2 次。

components.name: 8. Resuspend in assay buffer (without BSA for functional assays); quantify by BCA

note.en: 1–10 mg/mL protein. Integrity: cytochrome c oxidase activity ± detergent.
note.zh: 蛋白浓度 1–10 mg/mL。完整性验证：细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性（± 去污剂）。

components.name: 9. Functional integrity check: OCR (Seahorse/Clark electrode) or JC-1/TMRM

note.en: Healthy mito: JC-1 red aggregates; depolarized: green monomers. Use within 4–6 h of isolation.
note.zh: 健康线粒体：JC-1 红色聚集体；去极化：绿色单体。分离后 4–6 h 内使用。

notes.en: Differential centrifugation gives ~70% pure mitochondria. For functional studies, Percoll gradient recommended. Keep at 4°C; use within 4–6 h. WB markers: VDAC/TOMM20 (outer membrane), HSP60 (matrix), cytochrome c (IMS).
notes.zh: 差速离心纯度约 70%。功能性实验推荐 Percoll 梯度纯化。4°C 保存，4–6 h 内使用。WB 标记：VDAC/TOMM20（外膜）、HSP60（基质）、细胞色素 c（膜间隙）。

ref: Frezza et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:287–295; Wieckowski et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:1582–1590
